strategy: Bring Life damage and pierce. Hockins is immune to every school but Life and resists even Life around 85%, so hit with Life (or a Life prism) and stack armor piercing.

Exploit the Dragonspear cheat. Every direct hit hands your attacker a universal pierce blade that grows +10% each hit up to +100%, which is exactly the pierce you need to beat his resist. Keep hitting to build it, and use direct attacks, not DoTs (damage-over-time won't grant the spears).
Don't rely on criticals; the Witch Doctor opens with a Saga-of-Heroes cheat that drops your critical chance -75. Kill the Witch Doctor early to remove the debuffer.
Skip Global/bubble spells; casting one makes the Witch Doctor overwrite it with his own Saga of Heroes.
Pick an approach the guide gives: blade a hitter and burst with Shadow Shrike, Infallible, and Extraordinary, or spam smaller attacks first and save your big spell for when the pierce is near +100%.
Join on time so the Witch Doctor doesn't steal a pip with Steal Pips (Moon). He is stunable and beguilable if you need safe setup Rounds.
cheatNotes: The first hit on Hockins gives your attacker a Dragonspear (universal pierce blade). That's good for you, since his 85% Life resist needs pierce, so start hitting to build it.
The second hit gives a +20% Dragonspear, stacking more pierce onto your hitter.
The third hit gives a +30% Dragonspear, and the pierce keeps climbing.
After the fourth hit the pierce blades keep coming, adding +10% armor piercing each hit up to +100% max, so repeated attacks steadily build enough pierce to shred his resist.
Damage-over-time spells like Poison don't grant the Dragonspears, so use direct hits to farm the pierce.
The Witch Doctor opens with a Saga-of-Heroes version that lowers your critical chance -75, so don't count on crits; kill it to remove the debuffer.
Casting any Global (bubble) makes the Witch Doctor replace it with his Saga of Heroes, so your bubbles won't stick. Skip them.
Joining late makes the Witch Doctor cast Steal Pips (Moon) to steal 1 pip. Enter on time.
